reviews.review_description: This is a go cart game... Not nascar... I love it.

developer_response.body: Hi enise.savage.79! We are happy to know that you had a great experience with your game, thank you very much for your review, stay safe and have fun!

reviews.review_description: More like racing lawn tractors, a little to slow for me. Actually lawn tractors are faster...lol

Had high hopes for this game as its a good price, however its uncontrollable with the go controller and because of the erratic movements you get sick within seconds. Would be better if steering was by moving the controller rather than the touchpad.

developer_response.body: Hi malofkent, The car can be steering wiht motion controller or touchpad did you try change the configuration ?

reviews.review_description: This is a really fun and addictive game. It's more amusement park karts than serious kart racing. Very immersive and I experienced no problem with motion sickness. Controlling with the VR controller is good and precise.

developer_response.body: Hi brian.grounsell, Great! We are happy to know that you had a great experience with your game, thank you very much for your review.
